jira_text: Conref resolution fails when keyref points to content in another map. Minimal repro: create topic with conref to key defined in map A, reference from map B.
Keyscope inheritance breaks when multiple maps define same key. Need boundary test with nested scopes.
Heavy content with tables and codeblocks causes slow rendering. Stress test needed.
Output pages under topichead not getting opened. TOC shows topichead but child topicrefs don't open in preview.
Subject scheme validation fails for audience attribute. Need dataset with valid and invalid audience values.
Glossary term and abbreviated-form keyref resolution broken. Need minimal repro with glossentry, term, abbreviated-form.
Audience filter in ditaval not working. Topics with audience attribute should be filtered correctly.
Xref to another topic fails. Cross-topic link broken. Minimal repro: two topics, one xref to the other.
Conref and keyref together. Topic uses conref to variable ph and keyref to glossary. Both mechanisms need testing.
Deep map hierarchy causes timeout. Stress test: map with 100+ topicrefs in nested structure.
Xref to section inside another topic. Fragment #topicId/sectionId not resolving.
Platform-specific content filtering. DITAVAL with platform attribute. Need boundary test with multiple platforms.
Nested keydef chain resolution fails. Map A to Map B to Topic C. Key defined in parent map, used in child map. Keyscope inheritance.
External link to PDF. xref format=pdf scope=local not rendering. Need minimal dataset.
Same-file xref to section. Right panel link to section in same topic broken.
Conrefend and cyclic references cause false duplicate ID warnings. Topic A conrefs to B, B conrefs back to A.
Map stress: many topicrefs. Performance degradation with large map. Map parsing stress test.
Simple typo fix in documentation. No DITA-specific features. Just text update.
Broken xref href. Validator should catch non-existent target. Negative validation test.
